title: Product Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, pandas. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: MetricWave is hiring a middle product data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V035: Product Data Analyst at MetricWave. Location: Lviv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, pandas, statistics, airflow, looker. Optional skills: ga4, data storytelling. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
